batch_summary.dominant_tone: mixed — cooperative periods (Canada trip aftermath Jul 16-17, illness logistics Jul 19-22, Becky pickup coordination) punctuated by two RF-04 clusters
batch_summary.rf04_activity: moderate-high — 1 Sev-1, 1 Sev-2; sustained Aug 4-5 inadequate-father/DARVO mega-cluster is longest single attack sequence to date
batch_summary.notable_context: Canada trip return (Jul 16-17 — cooperative, Olivia emotional about leaving). Daycare planning (Jul 18-19). Olivia illness/medication logistics (Aug 2-5 abscess). Aug 2 DARVO-Abby dismissal: Eli's request for respectful communication → reframed as emotional dysregulation/Abby relationship problems. Aug 4-5 mega-cluster (~80 messages): scheduling dispute over morning childcare spirals into sustained inadequate-father barrage + financial character attacks + employment attacks + DARVO resolution ('walk out of her life / guilt'). ROW-6436 'new baby coming' reference weaponizes Abby pregnancy as housing stability attack (3rd pregnancy weaponization). ROW-6483 'shit father' new slur. COMP-RF04-016 (RF-04+RF-05).

primary_flags.summary: Aug 2 DARVO-adjacent dismissal — Eli's request for respectful communication reframed as emotional dysregulation and Abby relationship conflict. Context: Eli asked to be spoken to without orders/directives (ROW-6205: 'Could you please ask me in the future instead of giving me orders or directives like you're my superior?'). Melissa's response: ROW-6210: 'You're all up in your feelings today. Must be fighting with Abby' — contemptuous dismissal that attributes Eli's reasonable request to Abby relationship problems. ROW-6212: 'You took it wrong because you can't hear tone in a text and I understand that. Calm down' — DARVO-adjacent dismissal (Eli's legitimate concern reframed as his emotional misreading + 'calm down' condescension). ROW-6213: 'If you're fighting with Abby that's between you two. Don't take it out on me' — projection (Eli's disagreement attributed to his relationship issues, not the substance of the request). ROW-6216: 'Go do work' — contemptuous dismissal command. Pattern: Eli raises communication concern → dismissed as emotional over-reaction caused by Abby conflict → 'calm down' condescension → contemptuous command to disengage. ARC-RF04-001-S45.

primary_flags.type: sustained_inadequate_father_mega_cluster + DARVO_resolution + financial_character_attack + false_accusation + abby_weaponization + shit_father_slur
primary_flags.summary: Aug 4-5 sustained inadequate-father/DARVO mega-cluster — Sev-2. Longest single attack sequence in RF-04 dataset (~80 messages, Aug 4 evening through Aug 5 night). Trigger: scheduling dispute over morning childcare (Eli committed to watching Olivia in the morning but work meetings arose). Escalates from logistics dispute into comprehensive contempt/inadequate-father/legal-threat/financial-attack barrage. Structure across the cluster: (1) INADEQUATE-FATHER BARRAGE — ROW-6287: 'I can't understand why you have shared custody since you do nothing for her'; ROW-6296: 'She is also your daughter even though you don't act like it'; ROW-6297: 'You don't act like a father at all'; ROW-6298: 'You grump at her all the time. You don't take care of any of the responsibilities'; ROW-6344: 'What involvement do you have with her other than the 2.5 hours you spend with her every week sometimes skipping a week'; ROW-6483: 'You just want to blame me cause you are a shit father' (new ADD-002 adjacent slur). (2) EMPLOYMENT/CHARACTER ATTACK — ROW-6300: 'You get fired from all your jobs which is why your at wow again now'; ROW-6301: 'Your job has never been important to you which is why you get fired so much. Instead of working you play PlayStation'; ROW-6452: 'You're being financially behind is due to your poor work ethic'; ROW-6453: 'Playing PlayStation, making excuses and using 1/2 your work time to google how to do your job led to your issues'; ROW-6449: 'Your extracurricular activity stopped you from working' (covert insinuation about Eli's conduct during marriage). (3) FINANCIAL CHARACTER ATTACK — ROW-6427: 'You are not stable. In the last according to court documents you've faced eviction twice'; ROW-6430: 'You're getting assistance from my mom to buy milk school clothes' (false accusation — Eli: ROW-6431 'WTF? No I am not'); ROW-6432: 'You lived in a hotel for a week or so then in a camper'; ROW-6437: 'your house backs up with sewage'; ROW-6438: 'your car continually breaks down'. (4) ABBY WEAPONIZATION — ROW-6436: 'You already told her that your house isn't big enough for her and Milo and the new baby coming' (Abby's pregnancy weaponized as housing stability attack — 3rd weaponization of pregnancy narrative); ROW-6440: 'You also have have a second income in your household' (Abby's income used to undercut Eli's financial need arguments). (5) DARVO RESOLUTION — ROW-6514: 'Then to have her with you everyday all day and then just walk out of her life like nothing'; ROW-6515: 'And only see her a few hours a week now. No wonder you want to act like I make things difficult for you. You'd feel too much like [guilt]'; ROW-6516: 'If you had to take an honest look at yourself and your actions you wouldn't be able to handle the guilt of what you did'; ROW-6521: 'I know you won't go over that cause like I said if you took an honest look at it you'd feel too much guilt' — Eli's access concerns reframed as projection of his own unresolved guilt about abandoning Olivia; DARVO mechanism: Eli's complaint about access interference → dismissed as Eli's guilt about being a bad father. COMP-RF04-016 (RF-04+RF-05). ARC-RF04-001-S46.

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-6026: 'Call your daughter. She is all sad and she wants to talk to you. She's leaving Canada and her first crush' — mild child emotional state relay; Olivia's sadness about leaving Canada/crush framed as summons to Eli. Low-pressure; no escalation. ARC-RF04-002 peripheral.
ROW-6057: 'You switch jobs again?' — contemptuous employment instability insinuation mid-logistics discussion. Brief; consistent with recurring job-instability attack vector.

ROW-6075: 'Leave my dad alone. He doesn't like you' + ROW-6089: 'I know how you move' — contemptuous framing of Eli's wellness inquiry to Melissa's hospitalized father as having ulterior motives. 'I know how you move' implies Eli contacts family members as manipulation strategy. Brief cluster; no escalation.

ROW-6098: 'I feel like you are just excuses at this point but whatevs' — contemptuous dismissal of Eli's legitimate health concerns (bronchitis contagion) as excuse-making to avoid seeing Olivia. 'But whatevs' dismissal framing.

ROW-6201: 'And oooof you skipped a month of paying support' + ROW-6202: 'Oof' — contemptuous 'oof' framing of child support lapse; performative shock used to mock Eli's financial failure. RF-05 cross-tag (child support lapse).

ROW-6325: 'You let her down once again' + ROW-6350: 'Olivia is upset that you were supposed to watch her and now she doesn't get to hang out with you. Do you not care about that?' — child emotional state deployed as guilt weapon in the Aug 4-5 cluster. Connected to RF04-B017-002 primary. ARC-RF04-002 peripheral.

new_signals.summary: Aug 2 DARVO-adjacent dismissal: 'You're all up in your feelings today. Must be fighting with Abby' + 'Calm down' + 'If you're fighting with Abby that's between you two' + 'Go do work' — Eli's request for respectful communication reframed as Abby-relationship emotional spillover.

Aug 4-5 mega-cluster: sustained inadequate-father ('shit father,' 'you do nothing for her,' 'don't act like a father at all') + employment attack (fired/PlayStation/google) + financial false accusation (assistance from Melissa's mom — denied) + Abby pregnancy weaponized as housing stability attack + DARVO resolution ('walk out of her life / guilt'). COMP-RF04-016 (RF-04+RF-05).

compound_patterns.summary: Sixteenth compound multi-RF episode. RF-04 (Sev-2: sustained inadequate-father mega-cluster + DARVO resolution + financial character attack + 'shit father' slur; ARC-RF04-001-S46) + RF-05 (ROW-6279-6280 'contempt your ass' + ROW-6290 'good evidence to show court' + ROW-6306 'filing contempt' + ROW-6312 'file for sole custody' + ROW-6342 'solid case as to why you shouldn't have shared custody' + ROW-6345-6346 'I have those texts'). Triggered by scheduling dispute; escalated into comprehensive character assassination with parallel legal threat development.

cp3_item.summary: ROW-6279-6524 (Aug 4-5 B-017) — Aug 4-5 sustained inadequate-father mega-cluster Sev-2: 'shit father' (ROW-6483); DARVO resolution 'walk out of her life / guilt' (ROW-6514-6521); financial false accusation 'assistance from my mom to buy milk' (ROW-6430 — denied ROW-6431); Abby pregnancy weaponized as housing stability attack ROW-6436 ('new baby coming' — 3rd weaponization); 'extracurricular activity stopped you from working' covert insinuation ROW-6449; COMP-RF04-016 (RF-04+RF-05); ARC-RF04-001-S46. Notable also: ROW-6210-6216 (Aug 2) DARVO-adjacent Abby-relationship dismissal: 'Must be fighting with Abby' / 'Calm down' / 'Go do work'; ARC-RF04-001-S45.
